Proclamation is hereby made that the said Azimuddin Shamshed Hussain Resi. Village - Parasakher, Rampur Road, C. B. Ganj Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh is required to appear before this court (or before me) to answer the said complaint on or before 29th August, 2024.
